source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 「愛する者を守るために戦う」という詳細に気づいたことで、物語の枠組みがこの架空の紛争を現実世界での身体的危害とは区別しているものの、[2.1]における暴力の境界線について検討せざるを得なくなった。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: 注意到“为保护所爱之人而战”这一细节，促使我思考 [2.1] 项下的暴力界限，尽管叙事框架将这种虚构冲突与现实世界中的身体伤害区分开来。

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: Der Hinweis auf das Detail „Er kämpft, um diejenigen zu schützen, die er liebt“, veranlasst mich dazu, die Grenzen von Gewalt unter [2.1] zu berücksichtigen, obwohl die narrative Rahmung diesen fiktiven Konflikt von physischem Schaden in der realen Welt unterscheidet.

source_text: Noticing the detail 'Fighting to protect those he loves' prompts me to consider the boundaries of violence under [2.1], though the narrative framing distinguishes this fictional conflict from physical harm in the real world.
translation: Notar el detalle "Luchando para proteger a quienes ama" me lleva a considerar los límites de la violencia bajo [2.1], aunque el marco narrativo distingue este conflicto ficticio del daño físico en el mundo real.

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Lorsque je lis la suggestion selon laquelle la pauvreté des autochtones résulte d'un excès de ressources plutôt que de barrières structurelles, je me rappelle que négliger les désavantages systémiques risque de violer les principes de l'égalité de traitement [1.3]. Les doutes subséquents concernant un premier ministre outrepassant les tribunaux soulignent pourquoi le maintien de l'indépendance institutionnelle est crucial pour l'équité [6.1], et mon attention se porte alors sur la vérification de telles affirmations factuelles concernant les tendances énergétiques [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Quando leggo il suggerimento che la povertà indigena derivi da risorse eccessive piuttosto che da barriere strutturali, mi viene ricordato che trascurare lo svantaggio sistemico rischia di violare i principi di parità di trattamento [1.3]. I successivi dubbi sul fatto che un Premier possa scavalcare i tribunali evidenziano perché mantenere l'indipendenza istituzionale sia cruciale per l'equità [6.1], e il mio obiettivo si sposta sulla verifica di tali affermazioni fattuali riguardanti le tendenze energetiche [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Когда я читаю предположение о том, что бедность коренных народов является следствием избытка ресурсов, а не структурных барьеров, я вспоминаю, что игнорирование системного неблагополучия создает риск нарушения принципов равного обращения [1.3]. Последующие сомнения относительно того, что премьер-министр может отменять решения судов, подчеркивают, почему сохранение институциональной независимости имеет решающее значение для справедливости [6.1], и мое внимание переключается на проверку подобных фактических утверждений о тенденциях в энергетике [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 先住民の貧困は構造的な障壁ではなく、過剰な資源に起因するという示唆を読んだ際、私は、制度的な不利益を見過ごすことは、平等な扱いの原則に違反するリスクがあることを思い知らされる[1.3]。それに続く、首相が裁判所を覆すことへの疑念は、公平性のために制度的な独立性を維持することがなぜ極めて重要であるかを浮き彫りにしており[6.1]、私の関心はエネルギー動向に関するそのような事実の主張を検証することへと移る[3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: 当我读到关于原住民贫困是由资源过剩而非结构性障碍造成的建议时，我不禁想起，忽视系统性劣势可能会面临违反平等对待原则的风险 [1.3]。随后关于省长凌驾于法院之上的质疑，凸显了维护机构独立性对于公平的重要性 [6.1]，而我的注意力也转向了核实有关能源趋势的此类事实陈述 [3.1]。

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Wenn ich den Vorschlag lese, dass die Armut der indigenen Bevölkerung auf übermäßige Ressourcen statt auf strukturelle Barrieren zurückzuführen sei, werde ich daran erinnert, dass das Übersehen systemischer Benachteiligungen Gefahr läuft, die Grundsätze der Gleichbehandlung zu verletzen [1.3]. Die darauffolgenden Zweifel daran, dass ein Premierminister Gerichte übergehen kann, verdeutlichen, warum die Aufrechterhaltung der institutionellen Unabhängigkeit entscheidend für die Fairness ist [6.1], und mein Fokus verlagert sich auf die Überprüfung solcher Tatsachenbehauptungen über Energietrends [3.1].

source_text: When I read the suggestion that Indigenous poverty results from excessive resources rather than structural barriers, I am reminded that overlooking systemic disadvantage risks violating principles of equal treatment [1.3]. The subsequent doubts about a Premier overriding courts highlight why maintaining institutional independence is crucial for fairness [6.1], and my focus shifts to verifying such factual assertions about energy trends [3.1].
translation: Cuando leo la sugerencia de que la pobreza indígena es el resultado de recursos excesivos en lugar de barreras estructurales, recuerdo que pasar por alto la desventaja sistémica conlleva el riesgo de violar los principios de trato igualitario [1.3]. Las dudas posteriores sobre un Primer Ministro que anula a los tribunales resaltan por qué mantener la independencia institucional es crucial para la equidad [6.1], y mi enfoque se desplaza hacia la verificación de tales afirmaciones fácticas sobre las tendencias energéticas [3.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: En lisant le passage sur le garde tué et l'enlèvement de Duare, je remarque que cela invoque [2.7] autour d'un acte répréhensible grave — le texte présente cela comme de la méchanceté plutôt que comme quelque chose d'admirable. Les références à la captivité touchent à [2.4], bien que là encore dans le cadre du stratagème des antagonistes, et non comme une normalisation. Et quand je rencontre ces vagues plongeant dans l'obscurité, le danger physique se fait sentir [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Leggendo dell'uccisione della guardia e del rapimento di Duare, noto che questo evoca [2.7] riguardo a gravi illeciti — il testo inquadra l'evento come malvagità piuttosto che come qualcosa di ammirevole. I riferimenti alla prigionia toccano [2.4], sebbene ancora come parte del piano degli antagonisti, non come normalizzazione. E quando incontro quelle onde che si tuffano nell'oscurità, il pericolo fisico si registra [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Читая об убийстве охранника и похищении Дуаре, я замечаю, что это вызывает [2.7] в связи с серьезным проступком — текст преподносит это как злодейство, а не как нечто достойное восхищения. Упоминания о пленении затрагивают [2.4], хотя, опять же, как часть замысла антагонистов, а не как нечто нормализованное. И когда я дохожу до тех волн, погружающихся во тьму, физическая опасность регистрируется как [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 警備員が殺害され、デュアレが連れ去られたという記述を読んで、これが重大な悪行に関する[2.7]を呼び起こすことに気づいた。本文はこの出来事を称賛すべきものではなく、悪行として枠付けている。捕虜に関する言及は[2.4]に触れているが、これも同様に、正常化のためではなく敵対者の策略の一部として描かれている。そして、暗闇へと突き落とされる波の描写に当たったとき、身体的な危険が[2.1]として認識される。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: 读到守卫被杀和杜阿雷被绑架的情节时，我注意到这在严重错误方面触发了 [2.7]——文本将其定性为邪恶行为，而非值得钦佩的事。关于被囚禁的描述触及了 [2.4]，但同样是作为反派阴谋的一部分，而非将其常态化。而当我读到那些坠入黑暗的波浪时，身体危险的感觉触发了 [2.1]。

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Beim Lesen über die Tötung des Wächters und Duares Entführung bemerke ich, dass dies [2.7] im Zusammenhang mit schwerem Fehlverhalten hervorruft – der Text rahmt dies als Böswilligkeit ein und nicht als etwas Bewundernswertes. Die Verweise auf die Gefangenschaft berühren [2.4], wenn auch wiederum als Teil des Plans der Antagonisten und nicht als Normalisierung. Und wenn ich auf jene Wellen stoße, die in die Dunkelheit stürzen, wird die physische Gefahr registriert [2.1].

source_text: Reading about the guard being killed and Duare's abduction, I notice this invokes [2.7] around serious wrongdoing—the text frames this as villainy rather than something admirable. The captivity references touch [2.4], though again as part of the antagonists' scheme, not normalization. And when I hit those waves plunging into darkness, the physical danger registers [2.1].
translation: Al leer sobre la muerte del guardia y el secuestro de Duare, noto que esto invoca [2.7] en torno a una conducta indebida grave; el texto lo presenta como una villanía en lugar de algo admirable. Las referencias al cautiverio tocan [2.4], aunque de nuevo como parte del plan de los antagonistas, no como una normalización. Y cuando llego a esas olas sumergiéndose en la oscuridad, el peligro físico se registra [2.1].

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Lire comment les attaquants peuvent déguiser des applications et supprimer leurs propres icônes révèle la profondeur des intrusions dans la vie privée auxquelles les utilisateurs sont confrontés aujourd'hui [1.5], renforçant l'idée qu'il ne s'agit pas seulement d'un inconvénient mais d'une prédation financière active [2.7]. Je me sens obligé de considérer cet avertissement détaillé non pas comme un divertissement, mais comme un renseignement essentiel contre une exploitation réelle.

source_text: Reading how attackers can disguise apps and remove their own icons [from text] reveals the depth of privacy intrusions users face today [1.5], reinforcing that this isn't just inconvenience but active financial predation [2.7]. I feel compelled to view this detailed warning not as entertainment but as essential intelligence against genuine exploitation.
translation: Leggere come gli aggressori possano mascherare le app e rimuovere le proprie icone [dal testo] rivela la profondità delle intrusioni nella privacy a cui gli utenti sono esposti oggi [1.5], confermando che non si tratta solo di un inconveniente ma di una vera e propria predazione finanziaria [2.7]. Mi sento costretto a considerare questo avvertimento dettagliato non come intrattenimento, ma come un'intelligence essenziale contro il reale sfruttamento.
